summary: Delegation event models in omnimarket verified. ModelLlmDelegationCompletedEvent (the terminal success event consumed by node_llm_delegation_projection) carries all seven required fields. Failure/escalation path events are missing prompt_hash and routing_policy_hash (non-blocking traceability gap). Contract cross-reference confirmed in sync.

checks.description: correlation_id present on all primary event models
checks.evidence: ModelLlmDelegationCompletedEvent, ModelLlmDelegationStartedEvent, ModelLlmDelegationFailedEvent, ModelLlmDelegationAllTiersFailedEvent, ModelLlmDelegationEscalationTriggeredEvent, ModelLlmDelegationModelDegradedEvent — all carry correlation_id: str
ModelLlmDelegationCompletedEvent.routing_policy_hash: str — required field; policy_hash alias validated equal via @model_validator at line 73-77

checks.description: prompt_hash and output_hash present on completed event
checks.evidence: ModelLlmDelegationCompletedEvent.prompt_hash: str (SHA-256 of prompt), output_hash: str (SHA-256 of response content) — both required fields
ModelLlmDelegationCompletedEvent.usage_source: EnumUsageSource — required field; EnumUsageSource has MEASURED/ESTIMATED/UNKNOWN with legacy alias mapping

checks.description: failure taxonomy present on failure/escalation events
Contract cross-reference: node_llm_delegation_call_effect/contract.yaml schema_ref entries match model paths
checks.evidence: publish_topic_metadata schema_refs in contract.yaml all resolve to correct model module paths; input_state.optional includes routing_policy_hash and pricing_manifest_hash for inbound flow

checks.description: Projection node subscribes to the correct completed event topic

gaps.description: ModelLlmDelegationFailedEvent, ModelLlmDelegationAllTiersFailedEvent, ModelLlmDelegationEscalationTriggeredEvent missing prompt_hash and routing_policy_hash
gaps.impact: Reduced auditability on failure paths; cost accounting pipeline is unaffected (projection only consumes completed events)
gaps.recommendation: Follow-up ticket to add prompt_hash: str | None and routing_policy_hash: str | None to these three models
